evidence: I am a die hard romantic, so for me, this was a romantic story with absolutely everything except for a fourth film.
I like this one, everything you wish for in a romance, but perhaps a bit more modern.
It leaves you guessing many things about the murderer right up to the end of the third season.
Though you know who the killer is from the beginning, it keeps you on edge watching the complex characters and how they interact.
It took me a while to get in to the series, don't watch much BBC, but I watched it only because of Jamie Dornan.
I watched all three seasons in a long weekend.
The acting was magnificent, both from Christian Bale and from Rosemund Pike.
The cinematography was incredible, worth is just to see the magnificence of it.
I like watching what Jamie Dornan can do.
Love Denzel in just about everything.
It keeps you on edge watching the complex characters and how they interact.
I found this to be a powerful movie.
The ending caught me off guard, very violent and actually made me cry.
It is what I call a small movies, but great actors that make it a great movie in my opinion.

summary: The user has a strong preference for romance and complex narratives, often enjoying character-driven stories with emotional depth. They show a high sensitivity to production quality and have a notable loyalty to specific actors like Jamie Dornan and Denzel Washington.
